display_in.description: Self Service categories to be displayed ebook in

device_inventory_field.description: -1 represents the location field 'Room'; any other number is a mobile device extension attribute ID.

hostname.description: Hostname or IP address of the server

certificate_used.description: Supports PEM and based64 encoded DER formats

hostname.description: Hostname or IP address of the server

notification_message.example: You can install TextWrangler by clicking this link or going to Self Service
Click here to open Self Service and install this new application!

always_enforce_lost_mode.description: Whether Lost Mode should be enabled after the device is wiped and re-enrolled (optional, but defaults to true)
always_enforce_lost_mode.example: Whether Lost Mode should be enabled after the device is wiped and re-enrolled (optional, but defaults to true)

enum: DisableLostMode (supervised and in lost mode only) (DisableLostMode deprecated 5-30-2025)
DeviceLocation (supervised and in lost mode only) (DeviceLocation Deprecated on 2025-06-12)
PlayLostModeSound (supervised and in lost mode only) (PlayLostModeSound Deprecated on 2025-06-12)

disallow_proximity_setup.description: If true, on the next reboot Proximity Setup is not allowed and the pane in Setup Assistant will be skipped. Defaults to false.
disallow_proximity_setup.example: If true, on the next reboot Proximity Setup is not allowed and the pane in Setup Assistant will be skipped. Defaults to false.

e_sim_server_url.description: The carrier's eSIM server URL to query. This URL is obtained from each carrier separately.

lost_mode_footnote.description: The footnote to be displayed for the EnableLostMode command (optional)
lost_mode_footnote.example: The footnote to be displayed for the EnableLostMode command (optional)

lost_mode_message.description: The message to be displayed on the lost device (Required for EnableLostMode command if lost_mode_phone is not specified)
lost_mode_message.example: The message to be displayed on the lost device (Required for EnableLostMode command if lost_mode_phone is not specified)

lost_mode_phone.description: The phone number to be displayed on the lost device (Required for EnableLostMode command if lost_mode_message is not specified)
lost_mode_phone.example: The phone number to be displayed on the lost device (Required for EnableLostMode command if lost_mode_message is not specified)

lost_mode_with_sound.description: Whether to play a sound on the device when the EnableLostMode command is sent (optional)
lost_mode_with_sound.example: Whether to play a sound on the device when the EnableLostMode command is sent (optional)

passcode_lock_grace_period.description: Number of seconds the screen must be locked before unlock attempts will require the device passcode (Required for PasscodeLockGracePeriod command)
passcode_lock_grace_period.example: Number of seconds the screen must be locked before unlock attempts will require the device passcode (Required for PasscodeLockGracePeriod command)

wallpaper_content.description: Wallpaper image in PNG or JPEG format, encoded using base64 (required for Wallpaper command if wallpaper_id is not specified)
wallpaper_content.example: Wallpaper image in PNG or JPEG format, encoded using base64 (required for Wallpaper command if wallpaper_id is not specified)

wallpaper_id.description: ID of existing icon within Jamf Pro to use (required for Wallpaper command if wallpaper_content is not specified)
wallpaper_id.example: ID of existing icon within Jamf Pro to use (required for Wallpaper command if wallpaper_content is not specified)

wallpaper_setting.description: Where to set wallpaper (Required for Wallpaper command.) Possible values include - 1 (Lock screen), 2 (Home screen), 3 (Lock and home screens)
wallpaper_setting.example: Where to set wallpaper (Required for Wallpaper command.) Possible values include - 1 (Lock screen), 2 (Home screen), 3 (Lock and home screens)

error.example: The location of the device could not be determined.

notification_message.example: You need access to corporate resources. Install this profile to get the premium WiFis.

patch_unknown.description: Set to true to patch versions unidentified by Jamf Pro patch reporting

grace_period_duration.description: Number of minutes to wait before automatically closing all apps required to be closed for an update

notification_message.example: An update for Google Chrome is available within Self Service

managed_password_length.description: Only necessary when utilizing the random action

The chart below includes additional requirements for usage of specific commands

| command | Parameter | Requirements |
| ------- | --------- | ------------ |
| DeleteUser (deprecated on 2025-02-25) (deprecated on 2025-02-25) | user_name | DEP enrolled device and user_name value (string) |
| DisableRemoteDesktop | N/A | macOS 10.14.4 or later |
| EnableRemoteDesktop | N/A | macOS 10.14.4 or later |
| UnlockUserAccount (deprecated on 2025-07-07)| user_name |  DEP enrolled device and user_name value (string) |

parameters.description: At this time, only 'policy' logs are supported
parameters.name: log

parameters.description: Supported values are a combination of [Zero, One, Two, Three, Six] and [Days, Weeks, Months, Years]. For example, JSSResource/logflush/policies/id/1/interval/Three+Months
parameters.name: interval

delete.summary: Flushes a single log for a given interval

parameters.description: Supported values are a combination of [Zero, One, Two, Three, Six] and [Days, Weeks, Months, Years]. For example, JSSResource/logflush/policies/interval/Three+Months
parameters.name: interval

parameters.description: At this time, only 'policy' logs are supported
parameters.name: log

delete.summary: Flushes all logs for a given interval

Finds all mobile device commands

post.description:
The chart below includes additional requirements for usage of specific commands

| command | Parameters | Requirements | Values  |
| ---------- | ------- | ------------ | ------  |
| DeviceLocation (DeviceLocation Deprecated on 2025-06-12) | N/A | Supervised and in lost mode | N/A  |
| DisableLostMode (DisableLostMode deprecated 5-30-2025) | N/A | Supervised and in lost mode | N/A  |
| EnableLostMode | lost_mode_message | Supervised device (required if lost_mode_phone is not set) | string  |
| EnableLostMode | lost_mode_phone | Supervised device (required if lost_mode_message is not set) | string  |
| EnableLostMode | lost_mode_footnote | optional | string  |
| EnableLostMode | always_enforce_lost_mode | optional (defaults to 'true') | boolean  |
| EnableLostMode | lost_mode_with_sound | optional (defaults to 'false') | boolean  |
| PasscodeLockGracePeriod (PasscodeLockGracePeriod Deprecated on 2025-06-26) | passcode_lock_grace_period | Shared iPad | seconds (integer)  |
| PlayLostModeSound (PlayLostModeSound Deprecated on 2025-06-12) | N/A | Supervised and in lost mode | N/A  |
| RestartDevice (deprecated) | N/A | Supervised device | N/A  |
| Wallpaper | wallpaper_settings | Supervised device | 1 = Lock screen, 2 = Home screen, 3 = both  |
| Wallpaper | wallpaper_id | Supervised device (required if wallpaper_content is not set) | Jamf Pro icon ID (integer)  |
| Wallpaper | wallpaper_content | Supervised device (required if wallpaper_id is not set) | base64 encoded PNG or JPEG  |
| RefreshCellularPlans (RefreshCellularPlans deprecated on 2025-07-15) | e_sim_server_url | N/A | This URL is obtained from each carrier separately |


**Required Permissions:** `create:pro:mobile-devices`, `create:pro:mobile-device-commands`

Finds all webhooks

delete.summary: Deletes a webhook by ID

get.summary: Finds webhooks by ID

post.description:
The `display_fields` are only applicable to the `SmartGroupMobileDeviceMembershipChange` event. Accepted values (capitlization sensitive) are the same as those available from the GUI when making and Advanced Search.

**Required Permissions:** `create:pro:webhooks`
post.summary: Creates a new webhook by ID

put.description:
The `display_fields` are only applicable to the `SmartGroupMobileDeviceMembershipChange` event. Accepted values (capitlization sensitive) are the same as those available from the GUI when making and Advanced Search. `display_field_additions` can be used in place of the `display_fields` element to append new fields to an existing webhook.

**Required Permissions:** `update:pro:webhooks`
put.summary: Updates an existing webhook by ID

delete.summary: Deletes a webhook by name

get.summary: Finds webhooks by name

post.description:

**Required Permissions:** `create:pro:webhooks`

put.summary: Updates an existing webhook by name
